title: Principal Fleet Manager at DTDC International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Fleet Manager at DTDC International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Fleet Manager looking for your next big career move? DTDC International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DTDC International Enterprises:
DTDC International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
